title: Alibaba Shows Progress in China AI Push, Lifting Shares
description: China’s e-commerce leader reported a triple-digit percentage gain in AI-related product revenue as well as a better-than-anticipated 26% jump in sales from the cloud division — the business most closely tied to the post-DeepSeek artificial intelligence boom.  Alibaba’s progress in AI — where it is considered among the frontrunners in Chinese artificial intelligence development — helped gloss over concerns about an intense price war with JD and Meituan in the giant food delivery sector.
